name: Classic Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare a 9-inch pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
To prepare crust, combine graham cracker crumbs, 1/4 cup granulated sugar, and melted margarine. Press into the bottom and up the sides of the prepared pan. Bake for 6 minutes. Do not allow to brown.
Meanwhile, to prepare filling, combine cream cheese, brown sugar, pumpkin puree, cornstarch, cinnamon, nutmeg, and whipped egg whites in a mixing bowl. Pour into the prebaked crust. Bake for 45 minutes or until center is slightly soft to the touch.
While the cheesecake is baking, prepare topping by combining sour cream, remaining granulated sugar, and vanilla in a mixing bowl. Spread over the surface of the filling. Return to oven and bake for 5 minutes.
